title: Fix event cleanup when client closes connection

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@edsantiago Any chance you remember if these are the same errors #6680 saw?
Yep, that's exactly it. Now where did I write down my reproducer? It's a trivial two-liner.
@edsantiago No need, I don't think I'm brave enough to try and salvage this. I'll go with a different approach.
@mheon check your email, date 24 June, subject 'PR 6680 reproducer in 1minutetip'. I wrote down a lot of notes there.
